context: Three-way ablation testing fixes for ReverseRibosome's 0.21% LAMBADA. Theories: A=bypass gate, B=more chunks, C=deeper reverse. All three failed to break LAMBADA above 0.33%, confirming compression-ratio dominance.

experiments.interpretation: Gate did not learn bimodal distribution. Cost wt103 ~2x. Theory A: REJECTED at this scale.
Best wt103 PPL of the afternoon. LAMBADA went DOWN. chunks=32 is in the wt103-good/LAMBADA-broken dead zone. Theory B: PARTIAL - confirms chunks=64 is the actual unlock from the morning sweep.
More reverse capacity HURT wt103 without helping LAMBADA. Extra layers absorbed grad that would have gone to upper. Theory C: REJECTED at 25K budget.
4x more compute = 33% PPL drop (358 -> 240). Still 5x worse than RibosomeTiny on next-token. LAMBADA eval not yet run.

key_findings: wt103 PPL and LAMBADA acc trade off non-monotonically: PPL sweet spot is LAMBADA dead zone.
Three orthogonal architectural fixes (bypass, chunks, depth) all failed at chunks=16.
The morning chunks=64 result (LAMBADA PPL 2.9) is the actual breakthrough; need to characterize Pareto frontier.
next_priority: Compression sweep at 100K steps, chunks in {48, 64, 96, 128}, with reverse_layers=2.
